### Session 14d37845-3016-468a-b7ca-8b2c1c0f689e - 2026-07-19T03:45:46.505Z

- Spencer requested running the OptimoRoute/Jobber automation for week 07-20, routing all customers to correct days and OptimoRoute, with review in OR before writing back to Jobber.

- Claude Code executed the weekly push: 532 visits geocoded and routed via SYNC, 0 unrouted, all assignments honored on promised days (Mon–Fri with 5 techs: Spencer, Luke, Cammeron, Cory).

- Optimizer redistributed 283 floating/anytime-window visits across the week for density (normal Friday baseline). No committed or set visits moved.

- Two findings flagged for review in OptimoRoute Plan view:
  - Spencer routed all 5 days (139 stops/week, 26/25/33/29/26 per day); can be disabled before replan if full field not wanted.
  - Load imbalance: Luke 82 stops vs Cory 167; balancing used work-time + clustering (territory-gravity effect). Replan with `--overlap` available if leveling needed.

- Write-back plan saved to `optimize-plan.json` (532 writes: 387 tech changes, 283 day-moves). Waiting for Spencer's review and approval before pushing to Jobber.

- Next: Spencer to inspect OR board; then either approve push or request replan (days off, overlap balancing, or both).
